revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Disambiguation pages]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24608848913|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:二塚古墳]]


'''Futatsuka Kofun''' (二塚古墳) is the name of several {{ill|Kofun|en|Kofun|qid=Q1141225|lt=Kofun|1=Kofun}} (ancient Kofuns) in Japan.

* {{ill|Futatsuka Kofun (Sendai)|ja|二塚古墳 (仙台市)|1=Futatsuzuka Kofun (Sendai)|lkt=Futatsuzuka Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Futatsuka Kofun (Sendai)|13=User:Immanuelle/Futatsuzuka Kofun (Sendai)|qq=}} ({{ill|Sendai|en|Sendai|qid=Q46747|lt=Sendai|1=Sendai}}, {{ill|Taihaku-ku, Sendai|en|Taihaku-ku, Sendai|qid=Q1043331|lt=Taihaku-ku|1=Taihaku-ku, Sendai}}, {{ill|Miyagi Prefecture|en|Miyagi Prefecture|qid=Q47896|lt=Miyagi Prefecture|1=Miyagi Prefecture}}) – Destroyed after World War II.
* {{ill|Futazuka Kofun (Katsuragi)|ja|新庄二塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Futazuka Kofun (Katsuragi)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 二塚古墳 (葛城市)}} ({{ill|Shinjō, Nara|en|Shinjō, Nara|qid=Q1306429|lt=Shinjō-chō (Nara)|1=Shinjō, Nara}}, {{ill|Katsuragi, Nara|en|Katsuragi, Nara|qid=Q659672|lt=Katsuragi, Nara|1=Katsuragi, Nara}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|en|Nara Prefecture|qid=Q131287|lt=Nara Prefecture|1=Nara Prefecture}}) – Designated as a {{ill|Historic site|en|Historic site|qid=Q1081138|lt=Historic site of Japan|1=Historic site}}} by the government.
* {{ill|Iiji Futatsuka Kofun|ja|飯氏二塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iiji Futatsuka Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504233|1=Iiji Futatsuka Kofun}} ({{ill|Nishi-ku, Fukuoka|en|Nishi-ku, Fukuoka|qid=Q1132402|lt=Nishi-ku, Fukuoka|1=Nishi-ku, Fukuoka}}, {{ill|Fukuoka|en|Fukuoka|qid=Q26600|lt=Fukuoka|1=Fukuoka}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|en|Fukuoka Prefecture|qid=Q123258|lt=Fukuoka Prefecture|1=Fukuoka Prefecture}}) – A keyhole-shaped kofun belonging to the {{ill|Imajuku Kofun Cluster|ja|今宿古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imajuku Kofun Cluster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Designated as a Historic Site of Japan.


== See Also ==

* {{ill|Futagoyama Kofun|ja|二子山古墳 (曖昧さ回避)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Futagoyama Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 二子山古墳}}
* {{ill|Futagozuka Kofun|ja|二子塚古墳 (曖昧さ回避)|lt=Futagozuka Kofun (disambiguation)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Futagozuka Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 二子塚古墳}}
* {{ill|Uramachi Kofun|ja|裏町古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uramachi Kofun|qq=}}
* {{ill|Hitotsuzuka Kofun|ja|一塚古墳|1=Hitotsuka Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hitotsuzuka Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Hitotsuka Kofun|qq=}} 
* {{ill|Futatsuzuka Kofun (Sendai)|ja|二塚古墳 (仙台市)|1=Futatsuzuka Kofun (Sendai)|lt=Futatsuzuka Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Futatsuzuka Kofun (Sendai)|13=User:Immanuelle/Futatsuzuka Kofun (Sendai)|qq=}}
* 

* {{ill|Kabutozuka Kofun (Sendai)|ja|兜塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kabutozuka Kofun (Sendai)|qq=}}

{{translated page|ja|二塚古墳|version=52546040|comment=Imported full ja history}}
